documents.title: Research: Licensing, Terms of Use & Monetization Strategy for TeamHero
documents.summary:
Research and recommend:
1. Best open-source license for a CLI/dashboard platform like TeamHero (consider MIT, Apache 2.0, BSL, AGPL, dual-licensing)
2. Terms of Use template and what it should cover
3. Monetization strategies for AI agent orchestration platforms (freemium, open-core, SaaS, marketplace, etc.)
4. Competitive landscape - how similar tools monetize
5. Recommended strategy with pros/cons

Deliver structured findings with clear recommendations.

documents.title: Research: Multi-AI CLI Backend Support for TeamHero
documents.summary: Investigate whether TeamHero can support multiple AI CLI backends - OpenAI Codex CLI, ChatGPT CLI, Gemini CLI, and others alongside Claude Code. Produce a comprehensive research report with feature comparisons, architectural assessment, and feasibility ratings.
